rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF ANTHONY VIDAK
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 1/13/20. Single sided copies of the "Augmented Supplemental Petition," etc., filed on 11/6/19 and the "Supplemental Petition," etc., filed on 9/6/19 were not received by the assigned Examiner by 12/9/19. A "supplemental declaration" of the executor's attorney was filed on 11/6/19. A personal representative is required to sign and verify any pleading, including any supplement or amendment to his petition. The proof of service filed on 9/6/19 is incomplete at item 4 (date and place of mailing).

rulings.Case Title: GUARDIANSHIP OF ARTEMIS V STAHL
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT
rulings.Rulings: continued to january 27, 2020. the Receipt for Deposit of Funds in Blocked Account must have the signature of a bank official [the ones filed have the signature of the guardian, which is not acceptable]. Also, please file a declaration explaining why the account does not show any receipt of income for renting out the real property, given the duty to make property productive. finally, there is no proof of service of the Notice of Hearing for the revised account.
